post.subject: I just got attacked!
post.body: Yeah it doesnt look that bad - but its fuckin sore. I was walkin to the shop and some kid hit me when i was only 3 doors from my own house! He asked me for a cigarette. I told him a few times i didnt have one but he insisted. Then he pushed me into hedge then punched me i tried running and he punched me a few more times - like really fuckin hard! I cant fight and dont ever want to and dont really give a shit if anyone calls me 'pussy'. It fuckin killed! I managed to get away and ran back to my house - then my dad went out a min later and got in a fight with at least 10 of em! FUCK I HATE THIS FUCKIN PLACE! WHY DOES SHIT LIKE THIS HAPPEN WHEN THINGS ARE GOING WELL!?!

comments.body:
Fuck me, I mean what the fuck is up with that.
My flatmate had a little girl just walk past and roar in her ear, and then my sister and her mates were coming out of the moviehouse on the Dublin Road and some guy shouted abuse and then threw a cup of hot tea over my sister.  What is the funckin deal with all the spidey shite and fighting.  Its like they are a law unto themsleves.  Fuck it we should all band together and kill them.  A mass genocide.

Anyway on a lighter note, Phil I finished my exams, thank fuck (unless I have to repeat bits), so YAY
comments.author: chrissyk_lotn

comments.body: Grow a beard - spides don't touch you if you have a beard.
comments.author: floorswine
